'''datuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hideman|hideman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-t-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hideman|hideman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| datuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dætikith|dætikith]] || [[word:dætikij|dætikij]] || [[word:dætikish|dætikish]] || [[word:dætiki|dætiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:datutukuth|datutukuth]] || [[word:datutukuj|datutukuj]] || [[word:datutukush|datutukush]] || [[word:datutuku|datutuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:datukuth|datukuth]] || [[word:datukuj|datukuj]] || [[word:datukush|datukush]] || [[word:datuku|datuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:datufkuth|datufkuth]] || [[word:datufkuj|datufkuj]] || [[word:datufkush|datufkush]] || [[word:datufkuf|datufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:datukuthu|datukuthu]] || [[word:datukuju|datukuju]] || [[word:datukushu|datukushu]] || [[word:datukuku|datukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:datukuth|datukuth]] || [[word:datukuj|datukuj]] || [[word:datukush|datukush]] || [[word:datuku|datuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:datukuthul|datukuthul]] || [[word:datukujul|datukujul]] || [[word:datukushul|datukushul]] || [[word:datukukul|datukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:datukuthuthu|datukuthuthu]] || [[word:datukujuju|datukujuju]] || [[word:datukushushu|datukushushu]] || [[word:datukuku|datukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:datukuthun|datukuthun]] || [[word:datukujun|datukujun]] || [[word:datukushun|datukushun]] || [[word:datukukun|datukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:datukuthuoro|datukuthuoro]] || [[word:datukujuoro|datukujuoro]] || [[word:datukushuoro|datukushuoro]] || [[word:datukukuoro|datukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
